caption: The video begins with a white screen displaying the logo of the Institute for International and European Affairs (IIEA). The logo features a blue square with yellow stars arranged in a circle, reminiscent of the European Union flag, followed by the text "IIEA" and the website "iiea.com" along with the tagline "Sharing Ideas Shaping Policy." As the video progresses, the background transitions from white to a solid gray color, maintaining the same logo and text in the center of the screen. This suggests an introductory or transitional segment within the video, likely leading into a discussion or presentation related to the IIEA's mission and activities.
